title: Swight Texure Pack
description: A texure Pack for pvp, Reocommand for UHC, sword and Axe pvp!
body:
## UHC+ 1.21.11

**If you down load versions before 1.21.11 there is NO SPEAR TEXURE**

**UHC+ is a clean, weapon-enhancement texture pack built specifically for competitive PvP.
This pack focuses on improving combat visuals while keeping everything lightweight and performance-friendly.**

### ✦ What’s Included

- **🪓 Custom Diamond & Netherite Axe models**

- **⚔ Custom Diamond & Netherite Sword models**

- **🛠 Reworked Diamond & Netherite tools**

- **🏹 Edited Bow & Crossbow textures (pulling stages included)**

- **🧪 Custom Potion & Splash Potion textures**

- **🗡 Custom Spear textures (including in-hand variants)**
